overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through neon-lit downtown Night City. The player walks along wet sidewalks, turns corners, and crosses streets in a futuristic cyberpunk environment with holographic billboards and sparse pedestrian activity.

row of vending machines with glowing red lights
tall palm tree in concrete planter on sidewalk
tall street lamp casting yellow light on wet pavement
elevated highway or monorail structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rainy cyberpunk city sidewalk with wet tiled pavement. The player walks past a cyan trash can and glowing vending machines along a building facade, with a palm tree and street lamp visible. A white car drives past on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with red neon lighting

events.description: turns right at the street corner under the overpass
enters area under overpass with prominent red neon triangular lights

agents.ego_description: turns right at the corner and walks under the overpass structure with red neon lighting

entered.detail: elevated structure with triangular red neon lights underneath
tall building with illuminated 03 sign on top
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the corner and enters a semi-covered street beneath an elevated highway. The area is dominated by a striking red neon overpass structure with triangular lights. A tall building with an illuminated 03 sign rises on the right, and holographic billboards become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with bright neon storefronts

events.description: passes building with bright cyan W logo and MINDFUCK billboard
begins turning left at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: walks past neon-lit storefronts and prepares to turn left at the intersection

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing near the street corner

entered.detail: building with large glowing cyan W logo and vertical signage
large purple holographic billboard with MINDFUCK text

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the player passes a building with a prominent cyan W logo and a large purple MINDFUCK holographic billboard. The red neon overpass structure moves to the left as the player approaches the next intersection and begins to turn left.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and holographic billboards

events.description: crosses the wet street at the intersection
black SUV drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: crosses the wet street and continues along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection
two pedestrians walking on the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and red mailbox attached
skyscraper with multiple illuminated billboards on facade
building with warm orange accent lighting around windows

segments.scene_description: The player turns left and crosses the wide intersection, leaving the overpass behind. A black SUV drives past as the player crosses the wet asphalt. On the new sidewalk, tall office buildings with multiple holographic billboards line the street, and a few distant pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy city sidewalk into the heart of a neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins by moving past cyan trash cans and glowing vending machines along a wet tiled pavement as a white car drives by on the adjacent street. As the camera turns right, the environment shifts beneath an elevated highway dominated by a striking red neon overpass and a tall building marked with an illuminated 03 sign. The scene then progresses under the overpass, passing a cyan W logo and a large purple holographic billboard before the red structures drift to the left. Finally, the camera turns left to cross a wide expanse of wet asphalt, leaving the overpass behind as a black SUV passes and the view opens up to tall office buildings lined with holographic billboards and distant pedestrians.
